title: SUITE_5_3_19_RENDER_SYNC_2026-06-02.md
text:
# Suite 5.3.19 - Render Sync

Data: 2026-06-02

## Esito
Sync manuale WordPress -> Suite Control Plane Render completato per SkinHarmony Site Suite `5.3.19`.

Conferma owner ricevuta in chat:

`confermo sync Render 5.3.19`

## Core Gate
Prima del sync e stato chiamato il Core Codex Connector locale.

Esito:

- decisione: `REVIEW_REQUIRED`
- rischio: `low`
- owner_confirmation: `true`
- report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

La conferma owner esplicita e arrivata prima della chiamata live.

## Endpoint usato
WordPress REST:

`POST /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-manager/remote-runtime/sync`

Payload:

- `owner_confirmed: true`
- `include_evidence: yes`

## Risultati
Report locale:

`reports/wordpress/suite_render_sync_5_3_19_latest.json`

Esito sintetico:

- ok: `true`
- HTTP status: `200`
- version: `5.3.19`
- tenant: `skinharmony-suite`
- node: `wp_skinharmony_mother`

### Heartbeat
- ok: `true`
- status_code: `200`

### Snapshot
- ok: `true`
- status_code: `200`

### Commerce Snapshot
- ok: `true`
- status_code: `200`
- snapshot_id: `commerce_snapshot_7b3f94af-fcb8-4587-80bc-f85363769b73`
- privacy.aggregate_only: `true`
- privacy.raw_customer_records_stored: `false`
- privacy.personal_data_payload: `false`

### Evidence Push
- attempted: `5`
- ok_count: `5`

### Remote Dashboard
- ok: `true`
- status_code: `200`
- heartbeat_count: `15`
- snapshot_count: `15`
- commerce_snapshot_count: `8`
- evidence_count: `56`
- latest_plugin_version: `5.3.19`
- last_seen_at: `2026-06-02T10:38:44.033Z`

## Residuo non bloccante
Marketing journey dispatch:

- ok: `false`
- status: `not_queued`
- status_code: `404`

Questo residuo era gia presente nei sync precedenti e non blocca heartbeat, snapshot, commerce snapshot, evidence o dashboard remoto.

## Stato finale
Suite live `5.3.19` e allineata con Suite Control Plane Render.

Render vede:

- plugin `5.3.19`
- snapshot aggiornato
- commerce snapshot aggregate-only
- evidence push ricevute
- dashboard remoto osservabile
